quests.name: Exterminator
quests.summary: Kill cave rats infesting Drarayne Thelas's house in Balmora. Return to Eydis for your reward.

quests.name: The Egg Poachers
quests.summary: Eliminate two egg poachers at Shulk Egg Mine south of Balmora. Clear the mine and report back.

quests.name: The Telvanni Agents
quests.summary: Kill four Telvanni agents responsible for thefts at Caldera Mine. Travel to Caldera Mining Company and eliminate them.

quests.name: The Code Book
quests.summary: Retrieve the code book from Sottilde at the South Wall Cornerclub in Balmora. Persuade or pickpocket her to obtain it.

quests.name: Desele's Debt
quests.summary: Collect debt money from Helviane Desele at Desele's House of Earthly Delights in Suran. Persuade or intimidate her to pay.

quests.name: Gra-Bol's Bounty
quests.summary: Complete the bounty contract on the Orc Dura gra-Bol in Balmora. Find and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Alof and the Orcs
quests.summary: Rescue Alof from Orcs at Ghorak Manor in Caldera or handle the situation. Report back to Eydis.

quests.name: The Verethi Gang
quests.summary: Kill the leader of the Verethi smuggler gang in Mannammu cave, southeast of Pelagiad. Clear the cave and report back.

quests.name: Hunger in the Sarano Tomb
quests.summary: Eliminate a hunger daedra defiling the Sarano Tomb south of Balmora. Kill the creature and return to Eydis.

quests.name: Juicedaw Ring
quests.summary: Obtain the Juicedaw Feather Ring from an Orc named Rov in Hlaalu Waistworks. Retrieve the ring and return it to Lorbumol.

quests.name: Silence Tongue-Toad
quests.summary: Silence the Argonian Tongue-Toad in Ald'ruhn who has been slandering the Fighters Guild. Persuade or kill him.

quests.name: Dro'Sakhar's Bounty
quests.summary: Complete the bounty on the Khajiit outlaw Dro'Sakhar hiding in Vivec. Find and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Lirielle's Debt
quests.summary: Retrieve a 2000 gold debt from Lirielle Stoine in Ald'ruhn. Persuade or intimidate her to pay up.

quests.name: Vandacia's Bounty
quests.summary: Collect a bounty on the outlaw Vandacia in Seyda Neen. Find and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Alleius' Bounty
quests.summary: Collect a bounty on judge Alleius in Ebonheart. This is a Camonna Tong-directed hit, so consider the implications.

quests.name: Battle at Nchurdamz
quests.summary: Aid warrior Larienna Macrina against the daedra Hrelvesuu at Nchurdamz Dwemer ruin. Fight alongside her to defeat the creature.

quests.name: The Dissapla Mine
quests.summary: Rescue the healer Teres Arothan from Nix-Hounds infesting Dissapla Mine. Clear the mine of creatures.

quests.name: Berwen's Stalker
quests.summary: Kill the corprus stalker in Berwen's shop in Tel Mora. Eliminate the diseased creature threatening the shopkeeper.

quests.name: Tenim's Bounty
quests.summary: Kill outlaw Rels Tenim found near Vos. Track down and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Sujamma to Dunirai
quests.summary: Deliver sujamma to Nelacar at Dunirai Caverns. Transport the bottles and hand them over.

quests.name: Sondaale
quests.summary: Rescue researcher Sondaale from Sixth House cultists at Telasero. Find her and escort her safely out of the ruin.

quests.name: Engaer's Bounty
quests.summary: Eliminate outlaw Engaer in Tel Naga. Find and kill the target in the Telvanni tower.

quests.name: The Pudai Eggmine
quests.summary: Retrieve the Seven Eggs of Gold from Pudai Egg Mine in the Sheogorad region. Locate the eggs deep in the mine and return them.

quests.name: The Necromancer of Vas
quests.summary: Clear a necromancer den in the Sheogorad region at Vas. Travel far north and eliminate the necromancer and undead.

quests.name: Beneran's Bounty
quests.summary: Collect a bounty on the murderer Nerer Beneran hiding in Sargon. Find and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Bandits in Suran
quests.summary: Eliminate bandits in Suran for Avon Oran. Find and clear out the bandit group threatening the town.

quests.name: Flin for Elith-Pal
quests.summary: Deliver flin to Elith-Pal Mine at the base of Red Mountain. Transport the alcohol through dangerous territory.

quests.name: Remove Sjoring's Supporters
quests.summary: Kill two corrupted Fighters Guild members who support the Camonna Tong. Eliminate Lorbumol gro-Aglakh and Duronos Gal.

quests.name: Kill Hard-Heart
quests.summary: Assassinate Fighters Guild Master Sjoring Hard-Heart in the Vivec guild hall. Defeat him to become the new Guild Master.

quests.name: Remove the Heads of the Thieves Guild
quests.summary: Eliminate all three Thieves Guild bosses: Sugar-Lips Habasi, Aengoth the Jeweler, and Big Helende. This is a Camonna Tong plot.

quests.name: Kill the Master Thief
quests.summary: Assassinate Gentleman Jim Stacey, leader of the Thieves Guild, at Simine Fralinie's Bookseller in Vivec. This completes the Camonna Tong questline.

quests.name: Four Types of Mushrooms
quests.summary: Collect four mushroom samples: Luminous Russula, Violet Coprinus, Bungler's Bane, and Hypha Facia. Find them in the wilderness around Balmora and return them to Ajira.

quests.name: Fake Soul Gem
quests.summary: Help Ajira win a bet against Galbedir by placing a fake soul gem on Galbedir's desk upstairs. Return to Ajira when done.

quests.name: Four Types of Flowers
quests.summary: Collect four flower samples: Gold Kanet, Stoneflower, Willow Anther, and Heather. Return all four to Ajira.

quests.name: Ceramic Bowl
quests.summary: Buy a ceramic bowl from Ra'Virr or Nalcarya in Balmora and bring it to Ajira for her alchemy experiments.

quests.name: Stolen Reports
quests.summary: Find Ajira's stolen mushroom and flower reports. They were hidden behind Galbedir's desk by a rival. Retrieve and return them.

quests.name: The Staff of Magnus
quests.summary: Recover the powerful Staff of Magnus from Assu cave in the Molag Amur region. Fight through daedra to retrieve this artifact.

quests.name: Warlock's Ring
quests.summary: Retrieve the Warlock's Ring. Ajira provides location information for this powerful artifact that provides speed and health regeneration.

quests.name: Recruit or Kill Llarar Bereloth
quests.summary: Travel to Sulipund to recruit the Telvanni mage Llarar Bereloth into the Mages Guild, or eliminate him if he refuses.

quests.name: Manwe's Dues
quests.summary: Retrieve overdue guild dues from the mage Manwe in Punabi. Persuade her to pay or handle the situation.

quests.name: Unsanctioned Training
quests.summary: Stop the Argonian Only-He-Stands-There from offering Restoration training without guild approval in Balmora. Persuade or threaten him to stop.

quests.name: Escort Itermerel
quests.summary: Escort the scholar Itermerel safely from Balmora to Pelagiad. Protect him from any threats along the way.

quests.name: Kill Necromancer Tashpi Ashibael
quests.summary: Investigate and eliminate the necromancer Tashpi Ashibael near Maar Gan. She can also be spared if you speak to her first.

quests.name: Catch a Spy
quests.summary: Search for the Telvanni spy Tiram Gadar infiltrating the guild. Find and apprehend or eliminate the spy.

quests.name: Chronicles of Nchuleft
quests.summary: Search for the rare Dwemer book 'Chronicles of Nchuleft.' It can be found in several locations including Jobasha's bookshop in Vivec.

quests.name: A Potion from Skink-in-Tree's-Shade
quests.summary: Fetch a potion from Skink-in-Tree's-Shade at the Wolverine Hall guild in Sadrith Mora. Deliver it back to Edwinna.

quests.name: Steal Chimarvamidium
quests.summary: Borrow the rare book Chimarvamidium from the Vivec Guild of Mages. Sneak it out and bring it to Edwinna for study.

quests.name: Huleen's Hut
quests.summary: Investigate reports of disturbances from Huleen's Hut in Maar Gan. A Centurion Spider has been activated inside.

quests.name: Return Chimarvamidium
quests.summary: Return the previously borrowed book Chimarvamidium to its place in the Vivec Guild of Mages library.

quests.name: Dwemer Tube from Arkngthunch-Sturdumz
quests.summary: Acquire a rare Dwemer Tube from the Arkngthunch-Sturdumz ruin west of Ald'ruhn. Navigate Dwemer automatons to find it.

quests.name: Nchuleftingth Expedition
quests.summary: Check on an expedition to the Dwemer ruin of Nchuleftingth south of Balmora. Find and aid the researchers.

quests.name: Scarab Plans in Mzuleft
quests.summary: Retrieve Dwemer scarab plans from the Mzuleft ruins in the Sheogorad region. Navigate the ruin to find the plans.

quests.name: Bethamez
quests.summary: Retrieve ancient Dwemer documents from Bethamez, the Dwemer ruin beneath Gnisis. Access it through the egg mine.

quests.name: Escort Tenyeminwe
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Escort the scholar Tenyeminwe safely to the docks of Sadrith Mora. Protect her from threats along the way.

quests.name: Vampires of Vvardenfell, Vol II
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Find the rare book 'Vampires of Vvardenfell, Volume II.' Check bookshops in Vivec and other towns.

quests.name: Meeting with a Wise Woman
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Arrange a meeting between Skink and an Ashlander Wise Woman. Travel to an Ashlander camp and convince a wise woman to meet.

quests.name: Kill Necromancer Telura Ulver
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Eliminate the former guild member Telura Ulver who has turned to necromancy. Find her and put an end to her dark practices.

quests.name: Soul of an Ash Ghoul
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Capture the soul of an Ash Ghoul using a soul gem for Skink's research. Find an Ash Ghoul near Red Mountain and trap its soul.

quests.name: Galur Rithari's Papers
quests.location: Wolverine Hall, Guild of Mages (Sadrith Mora)
quests.summary: Find Galur Rithari's rare papers about vampirism causes and cures. Search in the Vivec Library or other locations.

quests.name: Mystery of the Dwarves
quests.summary: Discover what happened to the Dwemer civilization. Research the topic and report back with findings about their disappearance.

quests.name: Kill the Telvanni Councilors
quests.summary: Eliminate all Telvanni councilors as ordered by the Arch-Mage. This is an extreme request that can be avoided through other means.

quests.name: A Wizard's Staff
quests.summary: Procure a Wizard's Staff to advance to Wizard rank. Purchase one for 5000 gold or find one in the world.

quests.name: I'm NOT a Necromancer!
quests.summary: Discover and confront a practitioner of forbidden necromantic arts within guild ranks. Investigate the accusations and resolve the situation.

quests.name: Arch-Mage
quests.summary: Replace Trebonius as Arch-Mage of the Mages Guild. Challenge him to a duel in the Arena or use persuasion to make him step down.

quests.name: Diamonds for Habasi
quests.summary: Obtain a diamond from Nalcarya the alchemist in Balmora. Steal it or buy one and bring it to Habasi.

quests.name: Nerano Manor Key
quests.summary: Acquire the key to Nerano Manor in Balmora. Pickpocket or persuade the owner for the key.

quests.name: Ra'Zhid's Dwemer Artifacts
quests.summary: Recover Dwemer artifacts from Ra'Zhid in Hla Oad. Travel there and retrieve the stolen goods.

quests.name: The Vintage Brandy
quests.summary: Steal vintage brandy from Ralen Hlaalo's manor in Balmora. Sneak in and grab the bottles.

quests.name: Free New-Shoes Bragor
quests.summary: Free fellow guild member New-Shoes Bragor from the prison in Pelagiad. Pick the lock or obtain the key to free him.

quests.name: Master of Security
quests.summary: Help Habasi locate a security master in Balmora. Find the expert and report their location.

quests.name: Loot the Mages Guild
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Steal an enchanted tanto from the Ald'ruhn Mages Guild. Sneak in and take the weapon without being caught.

quests.name: Redoran Master Helm
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Steal a Redoran Master Helm. Find one in the Redoran Council Hall in Ald'ruhn and take it.

quests.name: Naughty Gandosa
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Find incriminating evidence about the Arobar family in Ald'ruhn. Locate Gandosa Arobar's compromising book.

quests.name: Withershins
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Find a copy of the rare book Withershins. Check bookshops or steal one from a private collection.

quests.name: Retrieve the Scrap Metal
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Retrieve Dwemer scrap metal to protect the Thieves Guild by having a Centurion Spider built. Gather the materials needed.

quests.name: The Darts of Judgement
quests.location: The Rat In The Pot, Ald'ruhn
quests.summary: Steal four daedric Darts of Judgement from a Redoran guard. Pickpocket or sneak to obtain them.

quests.name: Potion Recipe
quests.summary: Steal a potion recipe from the local alchemist in Sadrith Mora. Sneak into the shop and grab the recipe.

quests.name: The Grandmaster's Retort
quests.summary: Steal a Grandmaster's Retort, a valuable alchemy apparatus. Find and take one from its owner.

quests.name: Wizard For Hire
quests.summary: Hire a battlemage to protect the Thieves Guild. Find a willing wizard and recruit them for protection.

quests.name: Redoran Cookbook
quests.summary: Steal a copy of 'Redoran Cooking Secrets' from its owner. Find the book and bring it to Helende.

quests.name: Felen's Ebony Staff
quests.summary: Steal Felen Maryon's enchanted ebony staff in Tel Branora. Sneak into the wizard's tower and take the staff.

quests.name: Find Brother Nads
quests.summary: Find fellow guild member Brother Nads who has disappeared. Investigate his whereabouts and report back.

quests.name: Speak With Percius
quests.summary: Visit Percius Mercius in the Ald'ruhn Fighters Guild to learn about the Camonna Tong's influence on the Fighters Guild.

quests.name: The Bitter Cup
quests.summary: Find the Bittercup artifact in Ald Redaynia and use it to persuade Eydis Fire-Eye to betray the Camonna Tong.

quests.name: Hrundi's Lover
quests.summary: Persuade Hrundi in Sadrith Mora's Fighters Guild to join the Thieves Guild against the Camonna Tong by finding his lover.

quests.name: The Brothers Ienith
quests.summary: Kill the Ienith brothers, two enforcers of the Camonna Tong, at Dren Plantation. Eliminate both targets.

quests.name: Kill Hard-Heart
quests.summary: Kill Sjoring Hard-Heart, the corrupt Master of the Fighters Guild, in Vivec. This ends the Camonna Tong's grip on the Fighters Guild.

quests.name: The Hlervu Locket (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal a locket and return it to its rightful owner as part of the Bal Molagmer Robin Hood-style missions. Wear the Bal Molagmer gloves.

quests.name: Yngling's Ledger (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal Yngling Half-Troll's ledger to expose corruption in Vivec. Deliver the evidence to the proper authorities.

quests.name: Land Deed (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal a forged land deed from the Library of Vivec to prevent an unjust eviction. Return it to the rightful owner.

quests.name: Enamor (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Return the sword Enamor to Salyn Sarethi at the Tower of Dusk in Ghostgate. Retrieve and deliver the artifact.

quests.name: Brallion's Ring (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal a ring from the slaver Brallion in Sadrith Mora and deliver it to an abolitionist to aid the anti-slavery cause.

quests.name: Books for Vala (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal four history books from Odral Helvi in Caldera and donate them to Vala Catraso in Ald'ruhn for education.

quests.name: The Dwemer Goblet (Bal Molagmer)
quests.summary: Steal a Dwemer Goblet as a final Bal Molagmer mission. Complete this task to earn Gentleman Jim's full trust.

quests.name: Widow Vabdas' Deed
quests.summary: Obtain a land deed for Widow Vabdas in Gnisis. Investigate the dispute and recover the deed document from Hetman Abelmawia.

quests.name: Gnisis Eggmine
quests.summary: Cure the blighted Kwama Queen in the Gnisis Eggmine. Obtain a Cure Blight spell or potion and use it on the queen.

quests.name: Rescue Madura Seran
quests.summary: Rescue the kidnapped pilgrim Madura Seran from Ashlander outcasts north of Gnisis. Free her and escort her to safety.

quests.name: Rescue Ragash gra-Shuzgub
quests.summary: Investigate the disappearance of the tax collector Ragash gra-Shuzgub. Find her in Arvs-Drelen and rescue her.

quests.name: Talos Cult Conspiracy
quests.summary: Investigate the Talos Cult in Gnisis that may be plotting against the Emperor. Uncover and stop the conspiracy.

quests.name: Dwemer Artifacts at Drinar Varyon's Place
quests.summary: Find proof that Drinar Varyon in Ald'ruhn is smuggling Dwemer artifacts. Search his home for evidence and report back.

quests.name: Rescue Joncis Dalomax
quests.summary: Rescue the imprisoned knight Joncis Dalomax from the Daedric shrine Ashurnibibi. Fight through daedra to free him.

quests.name: Maiden's Token
quests.summary: Recover an embroidered gauntlet (maiden's token) from Varona Nelas in Assumanu cave. Retrieve the item and return it.

quests.name: Scrap Metal
quests.summary: Retrieve Dwemer scrap metal for a contest. Find the scrap metal and bring it to Radd Hard-Heart.

quests.name: Rescue Jocien Ancois
quests.summary: Rescue Jocien Ancois kidnapped from the Erabenimsun Ashlander camp. Find and free the hostage.

quests.name: Rescue Dandsa
quests.summary: Free the Imperial citizen Dandsa held by raiders in Abernanit cave. Locate the cave and rescue the captive.

quests.name: Breeding Netch
quests.summary: Eliminate a dangerous breeding netch pair near Balmora. Hunt and kill both the bull and betty netch.

quests.name: Sorkvild the Raven
quests.summary: Kill the necromancer Sorkvild the Raven in his tower near Dagon Fel. Travel north and eliminate the target.

quests.name: Courtesy
quests.summary: Defend Legion honor by dueling a Buoyant Armiger at Ghostgate. Travel there and defeat the opponent in combat.

quests.name: Honthjolf is a Traitor
quests.summary: Kill the Legion deserter Honthjolf hiding in Aharnabi cave. Locate and eliminate the traitor.

quests.name: Suryn Athones' Slanders
quests.summary: Kill the Ordinator Suryn Athones in Vivec who is spreading false information about the Legion. Eliminate the slanderer.

quests.name: Saprius Entius
quests.summary: Find and protect the Legion Knight Saprius Entius who has been falsely accused of murder. Locate him and clear his name.

quests.name: Lord's Mail
quests.summary: Retrieve the Lord's Mail artifact. Find this cuirass in Ebonheart's underground areas and bring it to Vantinius.
quests.reward: Knight of the Imperial Dragon rank

quests.name: Chrysamere
quests.summary: Retrieve the Chrysamere artifact, the Paladin's Blade. Find this legendary sword and bring it to Vantinius.
quests.reward: Knight of the Imperial Dragon rank

quests.name: Grandmaster Duel
quests.summary: Achieve the highest rank by dueling Varus Vantinius in the Arena at Vivec. Defeat the commander in combat to become the new leader.

quests.name: Gathering Marshmerrow
quests.summary: Retrieve five pieces of marshmerrow from farmer Balur Salvu in Pelagiad. Return the ingredients to Synnolian.
quests.reward: Skill book 'The Cake and the Diamond'

quests.name: Gathering Muck
quests.summary: Find five pieces of muck and deliver restore health potions to Gnisis. Return to Synnolian when done.

quests.name: Gathering Willow Anther
quests.summary: Collect five pieces of willow anther from Gro-Bagrat Plantation north of Vivec. Deliver them to Synnolian.

quests.name: Gathering Scrib Jelly
quests.summary: Visit an egg mine to harvest jelly from scribs. Collect five pieces and bring them back.

quests.name: Gathering Corkbulb Root
quests.summary: Harvest corkbulb root at the Arvel Plantation north of Vivec. Collect five pieces and return.

quests.name: Gathering Rat Meat
quests.summary: Kill rats in Vivec to obtain five pieces of rat meat for Cure Poison potions. Return the meat to Synnolian.

quests.name: Gathering Netch Leather
quests.summary: Kill a netch to obtain leather for crafting Cure Paralysis potions. Return the leather to Synnolian.

quests.name: Alms from the Skyrim Mission
quests.summary: Visit the Skyrim Mission in Ebonheart and collect charitable donations for the Imperial Cult. Return the alms.

quests.name: Alms from the Argonian Mission
quests.summary: Visit the Argonian Mission in Ebonheart and collect charitable donations for the Cult. Return the donations.

quests.name: Buckmoth Alms
quests.summary: Visit citizens of Ald'ruhn and collect charitable donations for the Imperial Cult. Gather gold from several donors.

quests.name: Shirt and Vest for Harvest's End
quests.summary: Collect a red shirt and black vest for the Harvest's End festival. Find the clothing items and deliver them.

quests.name: Brandy for the Fundraising Dinner
quests.summary: Find expensive brandy for a fundraising dinner. Persuade tavern owners to donate or purchase bottles.

quests.name: Donation from Cunius Pelelius
quests.summary: Collect a 500 gold pledge from Cunius Pelelius, the owner of Caldera Mine. Persuade him to pay up.

quests.name: Pledge from Canctunian Ponius
quests.summary: Collect a 1000 gold pledge from Canctunian Ponius at the East Empire Company in Ebonheart. Persuade him to honor his pledge.

quests.name: Missing Limeware
quests.summary: Recover a limeware bowl stolen from the chapel by the High Elf Caryarel in Gnaar Mok. Retrieve the bowl and return it.

quests.name: The Haunting
quests.summary: Stop the haunting of Nedhelas' house in Caldera. Find and destroy the ghost causing the disturbance.

quests.name: Thelsa Dral the Witch
quests.summary: Dispose of the witch Thelsa Dral hiding in an egg mine near Khuul. Find and eliminate her.

quests.name: The Silver Staff of Shaming
quests.summary: Find the Silver Staff of Shaming, last held by Linus Iulus, in the shadow of Mount Kand. Explore the area and recover it.

quests.name: Restless Spirit
quests.summary: Calm the restless spirit of murdered Julielle Aumine haunting Okur in Hla Oad. Investigate the murder and lay the spirit to rest.

quests.name: Ring in Darkness
quests.summary: Find the legendary Ring in Darkness in the caverns of Nammu. Navigate the dangerous cave and retrieve the artifact.

quests.name: Boots of the Apostle
quests.summary: Find the Boots of the Apostle in the stronghold of Berandas south of Gnisis. Fight through enemies to claim them.

quests.name: Ice Blade of the Monarch
quests.summary: Find the Ice Blade of the Monarch in the stronghold of Rotheran. Battle through the fortress to retrieve this artifact.

quests.name: The Scroll of Fiercely Roasting
quests.summary: Find the Scroll of Fiercely Roasting in the Daedric shrine of Ashalmimilkala on the west coast. Explore and recover it.

quests.name: Skull-Crusher
quests.summary: Find the powerful warhammer Skull-Crusher in the Forgotten Vaults of Anudnabia east of Sadrith Mora. Retrieve this artifact.

quests.name: A Lucky Coin
quests.summary: A special encounter at Ghostgate involving a lucky coin. Investigate the mysterious occurrence.

quests.name: Pilgrimages of the Seven Graces
quests.summary: Visit all seven grace shrines throughout Vvardenfell: Fields of Kummu, Shrine of Humility, Ghostgate, Gnisis, Maar Gan, Mount Kand, and the Palace. Donate the appropriate item at each shrine.

quests.name: Compassion
quests.summary: Cure a mortal enemy afflicted with Blight disease to demonstrate compassion. Find a Corprus sufferer and cure their disease.

quests.name: False Incarnate
quests.summary: Investigate claims of a possible Nerevarine candidate named Elvil Vidron in Suran. Confront the false incarnate.

quests.name: Pilgrimage to Maar Gan
quests.summary: Perform a pilgrimage to the shrine in Maar Gan and make an offering. Return to Tuls Valen when complete.

quests.name: Dark Cult in Hassour
quests.summary: Destroy a Sixth House cult operating in Hassour cave. Clear the cultists and their shrine.

quests.name: Disease Carrier
quests.summary: Convince a Corprus-infected pilgrim named Tanusea Veloth to leave Vivec city. Persuade her or cure her disease.

quests.name: Silent Pilgrimage
quests.summary: Take a vow of silence and complete a pilgrimage to the Sanctus Shrine west of Dagon Fel. Do not speak to anyone during the journey.

quests.name: Shoes of St. Rilms
quests.summary: Recover the Shoes of St. Rilms from the depths of the Daedric ruin Ald Sotha northeast of Vivec. Navigate the ruin and retrieve the artifact.

quests.name: Foul Cult Beneath St. Delyn Canton
quests.summary: Eliminate a Sixth House cult operating beneath St. Delyn Canton in Vivec. Find the hidden lair and destroy the shrine.

quests.name: Cure Lette
quests.summary: Cure a villager named Lette in Tel Mora of swamp fever. Use a Cure Common Disease spell or potion on her.

quests.name: Pilgrimage to Mount Kand
quests.summary: Demonstrate wisdom and bravery by visiting the Mount Kand shrine. Complete the pilgrimage and report back.

quests.name: Necromancer in Mawia
quests.summary: Eliminate the necromancer in the Mawia cavern. Kill the necromancer and any undead minions.

quests.name: Slay Raxle Berne
quests.summary: Cleanse the vampire lair at Galom Daeus and kill the elder vampire Raxle Berne, leader of the Berne clan.

quests.name: Cure the Outcast Outlander
quests.summary: Cure an ill Ashlander in a camp near Ghostgate who is suffering from disease. Use cure spells or potions.

quests.name: Food and Drink for the Hermit
quests.summary: Deliver food and drink to the hermit Sendus Sathis living on Shuran Island. Bring him supplies.

quests.name: Hair Shirt of St. Aralor
quests.summary: Recover the Hair Shirt of St. Aralor from the Sixth House stronghold Kogoruhn. Navigate the dangerous ruin to find the relic.

quests.name: Cleaver of St. Felms
quests.summary: Recover the Cleaver of St. Felms from the Sixth House citadel Tureynulal inside Red Mountain's crater.

quests.name: Crosier of St. Llothis the Pious
quests.summary: Recover the Crosier of St. Llothis from deep within Red Mountain's crater. This is one of the most dangerous Temple quests.

quests.name: Malacath of the House of Troubles
quests.summary: Begin the Pilgrimages of the Four Corners by visiting the Statue of Malacath at Assurdirapal. Make an offering at the shrine.

quests.name: Mehrunes Dagon of the House of Troubles
quests.summary: Renew the pact with Mehrunes Dagon by visiting his shrine at Ald Sotha. Make the proper offering.

quests.name: Molag Bal of the House of Troubles
quests.summary: Renew the pact with Molag Bal by visiting his shrine at Bal Ur. Make the proper offering.

quests.name: Sheogorath of the House of Troubles
quests.summary: Complete the Pilgrimages of the Four Corners by visiting the Statue of Sheogorath. Make the final offering.

quests.name: Ebony Mail
quests.summary: Retrieve the Ebony Mail artifact from the shrine at Mount Assarnibibi. This is the final Temple quest rewarding the highest honor.
quests.reward: Ebony Mail artifact; Patriarch rank confirmed

quests.name: Disguise
quests.summary: Acquire a dead Redoran's disguise and wear it to steal orders from Neminda at the Redoran Council Hall in Ald'ruhn.

quests.name: Alchemical Formulas
quests.summary: Eliminate a rival alchemist who is interfering with a loyal Hlaalu member's business. Handle the competitor.

quests.name: Inanius Egg Mine
quests.summary: Travel to Inanius Egg Mine near Suran and kill the blighted kwama queen to restore the mine's productivity.

quests.name: Guar Hide Squeeze
quests.summary: Persuade a guar hide merchant in Vivec to purchase only Hlaalu guar hides. Use persuasion or intimidation.

quests.name: Delivery for Bivale Teneran
quests.summary: Transport clothing orders to the clothier Bivale Teneran in Ald'ruhn. Deliver the package safely.

quests.name: The Death of Ralen Hlaalo
quests.summary: Investigate and solve the murder of the nobleman Ralen Hlaalo in Balmora. Find the killer and bring them to justice.

quests.name: Ebony Trade
quests.summary: Either convince Canctunian Ponius to purchase ebony exclusively from Hlaalu or shut down the competing Sudanit Mine.

quests.name: Bank Courier
quests.summary: Deliver a sealed treasury report to the Hlaalu vault in Vivec. Transport the documents safely.

quests.name: Murudius Flaeus's Debt
quests.summary: Collect debt money owed by Murudius Flaeus in Hla Oad. Persuade or intimidate him to pay.

quests.name: Escort Tarvyn Faren
quests.summary: Guide House merchant Tarvyn Faren safely from Vivec to Pelagiad. Protect him along the way.

quests.name: Telvanni at Odirniran
quests.summary: Travel to the Odirniran stronghold to locate Hlaalu survivors and eliminate hostile Telvanni operatives who attacked them.

quests.name: Exterminator
quests.summary: Kill diseased rats affecting Yngling Half-Troll's game stock in the Vivec Hlaalu canton. Clear the rat infestation.

quests.name: Ashlander Ebony
quests.summary: Negotiate with the Zainab Ashlander camp to sell their ebony exclusively to House Hlaalu. Persuade the camp leader.

quests.name: The Shipwreck 'Prelude'
quests.summary: Locate the sunken vessel 'Prelude' and retrieve a Daedric wakizashi from its wreckage. Dive and recover the weapon.

quests.name: Guard Ralen Tilvur
quests.summary: Protect Ralen Tilvur's smithy in Vivec's Foreign Quarter from theft. Stand guard and repel any thieves.

quests.name: An Admiring Sponsor
quests.summary: Meet Crassius Curio at his Vivec residence to receive his sponsorship into House Hlaalu. Endure his eccentric personality.

quests.name: Velfred the Outlaw
quests.summary: Locate the outlaw Velfred and compel him to pay outstanding smuggling fees to House Hlaalu. Find him in Hla Oad.

quests.name: Kill Banden Indarys
quests.summary: Eliminate the Redoran noble Banden Indarys at Indarys Manor between Maar Gan and Ald'ruhn. Kill him to weaken House Redoran.

quests.name: Bero's Support
quests.summary: Secure political backing from the reclusive councilor Dram Bero in Vivec. Find his hidden manor and gain his support.

quests.name: Kill Reynel Uvirith
quests.summary: Assassinate the Telvanni sorcerer Reynel Uvirith at Tel Uvirith stronghold. Eliminate him to weaken House Telvanni.

quests.name: Sealed Orders
quests.summary: Transport suspicious sealed orders to the Hlaalu vault clerk in Vivec. Deliver the documents without opening them.

quests.name: The Caldera Spy
quests.summary: Identify and apprehend the spy who stole documents from Caldera Mine. Investigate and find the thief.

quests.name: Erroneous Documents
quests.summary: Replace fraudulent land deeds with forgeries in Vivec's Hlaalu Records Office. Swap the documents discreetly.

quests.name: Rent and Taxes
quests.summary: Collect overdue rent and taxes from farmers in the area. Persuade or threaten them to pay their debts.

quests.name: Shipment of Ebony
quests.summary: Smuggle a shipment of raw ebony supplies to Ald'ruhn for the house. Transport the goods without being caught.

quests.name: Literacy Campaign
quests.summary: Procure two educational books and deliver them to the Ald'ruhn Mages Guild school for a literacy campaign.

quests.name: The Twin Lamps
quests.summary: Help the abolitionist Twin Lamps organization by locating and liberating an escaped slave.

quests.name: Free Hides-His-Foot
quests.summary: Rescue the Argonian slave Hides-His-Foot from Dren Plantation. Infiltrate the plantation and free him.

quests.name: Control the Ordinators
quests.summary: Consult with Archcanon Tholer Saryoni regarding gaining authority over the Ordinators of Vivec.

quests.name: Dealing with Orvas Dren
quests.summary: Negotiate with or eliminate Orvas Dren to break the Camonna Tong's influence. Visit Dren Plantation and resolve the situation.

quests.name: Stronghold (Rethan Manor)
quests.summary: Construct your House stronghold Rethan Manor south of Balmora across three building phases. Complete tasks for each phase.

quests.name: Mudcrab Pests
quests.summary: Eliminate mudcrabs pestering Drulene Falen's guar herd at her farm south of Ald'ruhn. Kill the crabs and report back.

quests.name: Deliver Cure Disease Potion
quests.summary: Transport a Cure Disease potion to Theldyn Virith at the Ald Velothi outpost. Deliver it safely.

quests.name: Find Mathis Dalobar
quests.summary: Locate the missing trader Mathis Dalobar who disappeared near Ald'ruhn. Search for him and report back.

quests.name: Founder's Helm
quests.summary: Recover the stolen Founder's Helm from Alvis Teri in Balmora. Retrieve it and return it to Neminda.

quests.name: Trouble with Bandits
quests.summary: Protect Drulene Falen and her guar herd from bandits threatening her farm. Eliminate the bandit threat.

quests.name: Guard Sarethi Manor
quests.summary: Defend Athyn Sarethi's manor in Ald'ruhn from assassin attacks. Stand guard and repel the assassins.

quests.name: Old Blue Fin
quests.summary: Kill the old slaughterfish Old Blue Fin bothering dock workers in Ald Velothi. Hunt the creature in the water.

quests.name: Ashimanu Mine
quests.summary: Eliminate a blighted shalk in the Ashimanu Egg Mine threatening the workers. Kill the creature.

quests.name: Kagouti Den
quests.summary: Kill the kagouti menacing the area near Ashimanu Egg Mine. Track down and eliminate the beast.

quests.name: Shishi Report
quests.summary: Check on Redoran soldiers stationed at the Shishi outpost. Report back on their status.

quests.name: Kill Gordol
quests.summary: Eliminate the Daedra worshipper Gordol in the Ashalmawia Daedric shrine. Fight through to find and kill him.

quests.name: Rescue Varvur Sarethi
quests.summary: Free Athyn Sarethi's son Varvur from captivity in Venim Manor. Sneak or fight into the manor and free him.

quests.name: Clear Varvur Sarethi's Name
quests.summary: Investigate the murder to exonerate Varvur Sarethi. Find the real killer and evidence to clear his name.

quests.name: Ondres Nerano's Slanders
quests.summary: Defend House Redoran's honor by confronting Ondres Nerano about his slanderous accusations. Silence him.

quests.name: Shurinbaal
quests.summary: Eliminate smugglers operating in the Shurinbaal cavern near Gnaar Mok. Clear the cave of smugglers.

quests.name: The Mad Lord of Milk
quests.summary: Pacify the enraged inhabitant of the settlement called Milk. Resolve the situation peacefully or by force.

quests.name: Duel with Bolvyn Venim
quests.summary: Challenge Archmaster Bolvyn Venim to a duel in the Vivec Arena for leadership of House Redoran. Defeat him in combat.

quests.name: Ash Statue
quests.summary: Investigate how Varvur Sarethi received a Sixth House ash statue. Follow the trail to uncover the source.

quests.name: Find Fedris Tharen
quests.summary: Locate the pilgrim Fedris Tharen who disappeared on the way to Koal Cave shrine. Search the route for him.

quests.name: Find Beden Giladren
quests.summary: Find the pilgrim Beden Giladren who went missing on his way to Maar Gan. Search for any signs of him.

quests.name: Recover Shields from Andasreth
quests.summary: Locate four soldiers who vanished at Andasreth Stronghold and recover their shields. Explore the ruins.

quests.name: Mission to Morvayn Manor
quests.summary: Recover an ash statue from Morvayn Manor that has been overrun by Corprus creatures. Clear the manor and retrieve it.

quests.name: Taxes from Gnisis
quests.summary: Collect overdue taxes from Hetman Abelmawia in Gnisis on behalf of House Redoran.

quests.name: Nalvilie Saren
quests.summary: Locate Nalvilie Saren, a lost love for Councilor Hlaren Ramoran. Search for her and report back.

quests.name: Evidence of Corruption
quests.summary: Recover proof of House Hlaalu corruption in the Caldera mining operation. Find documents as evidence.

quests.name: Shut the Mines Down
quests.summary: Close the Caldera Mine for Councilor Garisa Llethri. Convince or force the mine operators to shut down.

quests.name: Miner Arobar's Support
quests.summary: Determine what influences Councilor Miner Arobar's political decisions. Investigate his connections and report.

quests.name: Meril Hlaano's Slanders
quests.summary: Persuade or silence Hlaalu noble Meril Hlaano who is slandering House Redoran. Confront him.

quests.name: Redas Tomb
quests.summary: Retrieve three items from Redas Tomb south of Molag Mar: the Redas Chalice, War Axe, and Robe of Deeds.

quests.name: Duel of Honor
quests.summary: Convince Rothis Nethan to complete an honor duel he abandoned. Find him and persuade him to finish it.

quests.name: Slay Dagoth Tanis
quests.summary: Kill Dagoth Tanis at Falasmaryon Stronghold's lower level. Navigate the Sixth House base and destroy the Ash Vampire.

quests.name: Slay Reynel Uvirith
quests.summary: Eliminate the Telvanni wizard Reynel Uvirith at Tel Uvirith. Attack the rival house's stronghold.

quests.name: Slay Raynasa Rethan
quests.summary: Kill Hlaalu lord Raynasa Rethan at Rethan Manor on Odai Plateau south of Balmora. Eliminate the rival.

quests.name: Escort to Koal Cave
quests.summary: Guide Tuveso's son Deval on a pilgrimage to Koal Cave south of Gnisis. Protect him on the journey.

quests.name: Armor Repair Debts
quests.summary: Collect money owed by Buoyant Armiger Giras Indaram at the Molag Mar stronghold for armor repairs.

quests.name: Stronghold (Indarys Manor)
quests.summary: Build House Redoran's stronghold Indarys Manor through three construction phases. Complete objectives for each stage.

quests.name: Muck
quests.summary: Retrieve five pieces of muck for potion-making purposes. Gather the ingredient from mudcrabs or swamps and deliver it.

quests.name: Black Jinx
quests.summary: Locate the Black Jinx magical ring somewhere within Sadrith Mora. Find it and return it to Raven Omayn.

quests.name: Sload Soap
quests.summary: Retrieve five pieces of sload soap for Master Neloth's research. Find the rare ingredient and deliver it.

quests.name: Staff of the Silver Dawn
quests.summary: Find the Staff of the Silver Dawn hidden somewhere in Sadrith Mora. Locate and return the magical staff.

quests.name: New Clothes
quests.summary: Deliver a skirt to Mistress Therana at Tel Branora. Transport the clothing item to the eccentric Telvanni councilor.

quests.name: Slave Rebellion
quests.summary: End the slave revolt at Abebaal Egg Mine near Tel Branora. Defeat the rebellious slaves to restore order.

quests.name: Dwemer Books
quests.summary: Find three rare Dwemer books:Erta Mool, Hanging Gardens, and The Egg of Time. Deliver them to Baladas in Gnisis.

quests.name: Dahrk Mezalf
quests.summary: Recover the ancient Dwemer ring Dahrk Mezalf from the ruins of Bthungthumz. Navigate the Dwemer ruin to find it.

quests.name: Three Questions for Baladas Demnevanni
quests.summary: Travel to Gnisis and question Baladas Demnevanni on three pivotal questions about Dwemer history and civilization. Report back.

quests.name: Mission to Nchuleft
quests.summary: Retrieve Dwemer plans from the Nchuleft ruins located far west of Vos. Explore the ruin and find the plans.

quests.name: Coded Message
quests.summary: Deliver a coded message to Divayth Fyr at Tel Fyr. Travel to the legendary wizard's tower.

quests.name: Cure Blight
quests.summary: Deliver three Cure Blight potions to an alchemist in Tel Vos. Provide the needed medical supplies.

quests.name: Daedra Skin
quests.summary: Find and deliver a Daedra skin to Master Aryon in Tel Vos. Hunt a daedra or purchase the skin.

quests.name: Auriel's Bow
quests.summary: Locate the legendary artifact Auriel's Bow somewhere in the Ghostgate area. Retrieve it for the eccentric Therana.

quests.name: Flesh Made Whole
quests.summary: Retrieve the Amulet of Flesh Made Whole from Tel Naga in Sadrith Mora. Find and return the healing amulet.

quests.name: Drake's Pride
quests.summary: Find the robe Drake's Pride on a servant in Tel Aruhn. Locate and retrieve the enchanted robe for Neloth.

quests.name: Ring of Equity
quests.summary: Help Eddie retrieve the Ring of Equity from Neloth's treasury in Tel Naga. Sneak in and steal the ring.

quests.name: Amulet of Unity
quests.summary: Help Eddie retrieve the Amulet of Unity. Find and bring back this magical amulet.

quests.name: Baladas Demnevanni (Recruit to Council)
quests.summary: Convince Baladas Demnevanni in Gnisis to join the Telvanni Council. Persuade the reclusive wizard to participate.

quests.name: Mudan-Mul Egg Mine
quests.summary: Cure the blighted Kwama Queen in Mudan-Mul Egg Mine west of Tel Vos. Use a Cure Blight spell or potion on the queen.

quests.name: Wizard Spells
quests.summary: Learn three specific spells as required by Aryon for advancement. Acquire and demonstrate the requested spells.

quests.name: Odirniran
quests.summary: Help Milyn Faram who is under attack by House Hlaalu forces at Odirniran stronghold. Rescue the Telvanni member.

quests.name: Mages Guild Monopoly
quests.summary: Convince three Redoran Councilors to support a proposal allowing House Telvanni to compete with the Mages Guild's trade monopoly.

quests.name: Shishi
quests.summary: Rescue Faves Andas from House Redoran forces at the Shishi outpost northwest of Maar Gan. Fight the Redoran troops.

quests.name: Recruit a Mouth
quests.summary: Recruit a Mouth (spokesperson) to enable your promotion to Councilor rank. Find a suitable candidate.

quests.name: Kill Raynasa Rethan
quests.summary: Eliminate the Hlaalu noble Raynasa Rethan at Rethan Manor south of Balmora to weaken House Hlaalu.

quests.name: Kill Banden Indarys
quests.summary: Eliminate the Redoran noble Banden Indarys at Indarys Manor to weaken House Redoran's position.

quests.name: Archmagister Gothren
quests.summary: Secure support from all House Councilors and then challenge Archmagister Gothren at Tel Aruhn for leadership of House Telvanni.

quests.name: Stronghold (Tel Uvirith)
quests.summary: Build your House stronghold Tel Uvirith through three construction phases. Complete objectives for each stage of tower construction.

quests.name: Writ for Feruren Oran
quests.summary: Execute Feruren Oran to prove your worth and be initiated into the Morag Tong guild. Present the writ if questioned by guards.

quests.name: Writ for Odaishah Yasalmibaal
quests.summary: Execute the target Odaishah Yasalmibaal found near Tel Fyr. Present your writ to avoid legal consequences.

quests.name: Writ for Toris Saren
quests.summary: Execute the target Toris Saren in Vivec. Find him and carry out the sanctioned assassination.

quests.name: Writ for Sarayn Sadus
quests.summary: Execute the target Sarayn Sadus in the Zaintirari cave. Travel there and complete the writ.

quests.name: Writ for Ethal Seloth and Idroso Vendu
quests.summary: Execute both targets Ethal Seloth and Idroso Vendu in Vivec Temporary Housing. Kill both to complete the writ.

quests.name: Writ for Guril Retheran
quests.summary: Execute the target Guril Retheran in Vivec. Find and assassinate him per the writ.

quests.name: Writ for Galasa Uvayn
quests.summary: Execute the target Galasa Uvayn in Vivec. Carry out the sanctioned assassination.

quests.name: Writ for Mavon Drenim
quests.summary: Execute the target Mavon Drenim, a Telvanni wizard in Vivec. Kill this powerful mage.

quests.name: Writ for Tirer Belvayn
quests.summary: Execute the target Tirer Belvayn in the Shara dungeon. Navigate the dungeon to find and kill him.

quests.name: Writ for Mathyn Bemis
quests.summary: Execute the target Mathyn Bemis in Vivec. Find and carry out the assassination.

quests.name: Writ for Brilnosu Llarys
quests.summary: Execute the target Brilnosu Llarys in Hlormaren stronghold. Infiltrate the stronghold to complete the writ.

quests.name: Writ for Navil and Ranes Ienith
quests.summary: Kill both Ienith brothers in the Dren Plantation Villa basement. Eliminate both targets to complete the writ.

quests.name: Threads of the Webspinner
quests.summary: Collect all 26 Sanguine items scattered across Vvardenfell for Eno Hlaalu. Each item is a unique enchanted piece. Receive Mephala's reward upon completion.
quests.reward: Mephala's Skill (unique ability from Daedric Prince)

quests.name: A Contact in the Dark Brotherhood
quests.summary: Find the name of a Dark Brotherhood contact from an enchanter in the Vivec canton. Investigate and report the intelligence.

quests.name: Belt of Sanguine Fleetness
quests.summary: Recover the Belt of Sanguine Fleetness from Pelagiad. Find the Sanguine item and return it.

quests.name: Ultimatum for Movis Darys
quests.summary: Deliver an ultimatum to Dark Brotherhood member Movis Darys, persuading him to defect to the Morag Tong.

quests.name: Ultimatum for Carecalmo
quests.summary: Deliver an ultimatum to Carecalmo, a Mehrunes Dagon worshipper who aids the Dark Brotherhood. Confront him at his shrine.

quests.name: Ring of Sanguine Sublime Wisdom
quests.summary: Recover the Ring of Sanguine Sublime Wisdom from the Yasammidan shrine northwest of Gnisis. Explore the shrine.

quests.name: Execute Durus Marius
quests.summary: Kill the Dark Brotherhood assassin Durus Marius hiding in the St. Olms Underworks shrine in Vivec.

quests.name: Execute Severa Magia
quests.summary: Execute the Dark Brotherhood Night Mother Severa Magia in Ald Sotha. This strike cripples the Dark Brotherhood's operations in Morrowind.

quests.name: Grandmaster
quests.summary: Eno Hlaalu retires as Grandmaster and names you as his successor. Accept the title and leadership of the Morag Tong.

quests.name: Writ for Larrius Varro (Grandmaster)
quests.summary: Execute Larrius Varro at Moonmoth Legion Fort. This is a post-main-quest Grandmaster-level writ.

quests.name: Writ for Baladas Demnevanni (Grandmaster)
quests.summary: Execute the powerful spellcaster Baladas Demnevanni in Gnisis. A dangerous post-main-quest assassination.

quests.name: Writ for Dram Bero (Grandmaster)
quests.summary: Execute Hlaalu council member Dram Bero in his hidden Vivec manor. A post-main-quest Grandmaster writ.

quests.name: Writ for Mistress Therana (Grandmaster)
quests.summary: Execute the eccentric Telvanni council member Mistress Therana at Tel Branora. A post-main-quest Grandmaster writ.
